turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh, hi. I booked an appointment last week online and I want to, uh, change the timing. Not the date, just the time.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure, that's easy to do. Name and number please?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I see your appointment with Dr. Kiran Bhosale in neurology this Wednesday at 9 AM. What time would you prefer?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Can I get something after 11? I have a school drop to manage in the morning.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: 11:30 AM on Wednesday works for Dr. Bhosale. Shall I update that?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Updated! Wednesday appointment now at 11:30 AM. See you then, Ms. Bhatt.
